content.en:
"According to what I know, it is very difficult to get the opportunity to enter the Dream River, which is the ancestral land of the Dream Clan, and the Dream Clan attaches great importance to it. If it weren't for the geniuses of the Destruction Clan who also wanted to enter the Dream Realm, the Dream Clan would not have opened the Dream River!"

Ye Tian muttered.

For the Destruction Saint Clan, the Dream Clan is nothing, and they naturally will not resist.

Therefore, every once in a while, the Dream Clan will open the Dream River, but only 1,000 places are available to the public.

There are only 1,000 members of the Three Thousand Evil Clans, and they include members of the Destruction Holy Clan.

Most of the places will be occupied by the Destruction Holy Clan, and it is estimated that only a few three or four hundred places will be the turn of the three thousand evil clans, and none of the evil clans will be able to share a place.

Therefore, for many evil clans, it is very difficult to compete for the quota of the Dream River.

Even many geniuses of the evil clan will automatically give up, too lazy to compete for the opportunity that is not too good for them.

Ye Tian wanted to enter the River of Dreams, after all, he was now copying his body, and improving his cultivation was of little use to him, it was far less important than creating a Peerless Domain Ancestral Method.

But there are only 1,000 places in total, and many of the three thousand evil clans will apply to enter the fantasy realm.

The number of geniuses who apply will inevitably exceed 1,000 places, and the cultivation of these geniuses must be at the domain ancestor level, otherwise the benefits of entering the fantasy realm will be too few, there is no need to go, and an opportunity will be wasted.

Therefore, the genius cultivation applied for must be above the domain ancestor, but there is also an upper limit, and the upper limit is the top domain ancestor.

After all, when you reach the Supreme Domain Ancestor, it will be extremely difficult to make further progress, and at that time, the desire for the Domain Ancestor method will not be great.

Even if he created his own Domain Ancestor Method, it would be difficult to advance to the Invincible Domain Ancestor level.

Moreover, the Three Thousand Evil Clans and the Destruction Saint Clan basically relied on their bloodline to be promoted, but they did not rely on the Domain Ancestor Method, which only had the effect of refining the domain power and the flesh and soul for them, and there was no way to help them break the shackles.

Therefore, the strongest domain ancestors of the Dark Destruction Domain did not have much desire for the domain ancestor method.

Otherwise, the pressure of competition will be great, and it will not be Ye Tian's turn.

According to the current rules, if the number of applicants of the major evil clans does not exceed 1,000 people, then all of them will enter the fantasy realm, and if the number of applicants is exceeded, they need to rely on the strength, potential and talent of the application geniuses, so as to decide to let those geniuses enter the fantasy realm.

Another way is to exchange a lot of resources for places, but very few evil clans do this.

Because resources are extremely important to the evil race, even more important than the chance to enter the fantasy realm.

Ye Tian doesn't care about resources, what he values is this place.

So, he began to use his identity to operate.

The Holy Son of the Dead Universe is the Holy Son of the Demon Prison Clan, with a noble status, and he is also the son of the Ancestor of the Wind Demon Domain.

He almost took out his share of resources, and overdrew his future resources in advance, plus the mobilization relationship.

In the end, Ye Tian successfully won a spot.

Regarding Ye Tian's actions, the clansmen of the Demon Prison Clan did not understand very much, and felt that Ye Tian was completely a waste of resources by doing so, although he had obtained the quota to enter the Fantasy Realm, how could he cultivate without resources in the future?

The evil clan is very dependent on resources, they need resources to strengthen the power of the bloodline, and even need resources to break through the bottleneck, but they can't be like cultivators, comprehend the forbidden way, absorb the power of the dark taboo and easily refine the domain body to break through the cultivation.

Although the Wind Demon Domain Ancestor also felt strange about his son's behavior, he had also visited his son at the beginning, and there was no problem in terms of breath or soul.

Therefore, he did not doubt this son, and let him do it arbitrarily.

Moreover, as an invincible domain ancestor, he also has a lot of things to do, and he also wants to impact the level of the supreme domain ancestor, where is there a kung fu to manage the small things of the Immortal Yu Holy Son.

----------------------

this day.

Ye Tian, with the support of a group of top domain ancestor guards, came to the ancestral land of the Dream Clan, the Dream River.

Outside the Dream River, Ye Tian looked at this river, which was only about a few miles long, and was very shocked in his heart.

Such a river actually exudes the aura of holy relics, and it is still the ninth holy relic on the list of holy relics of destruction.

It stands to reason that the relics should not be in this form.

But it is a holy thing, and no one doubts it.

In addition, the River of Dreams cannot be moved, and even the Dream Clan does not seem to be able to take the River of Dreams.

However, the Dream Clan still built giant cities nearby to guard the Dream River to prevent other evil people from breaking into the Dream River.

Ye Tian waited temporarily in a Dream Sky City near the Dream River, and when the people arrived, they entered the Dream River together.

Soon, one by one, the geniuses of the evil clan arrived, and some of them seemed to be more familiar with the Dead Universe Holy Son, so they kept greeting Ye Tian, but he pretended to be indifferent and didn't respond much.

This caused many geniuses to wonder.

However, many people also knew about the Death Universe Holy Son's Soul Chaos Technique, and these evil clan geniuses only thought that the Death Universe Holy Son's soul had been injured and his temperament had changed greatly, so they didn't bother too much about Ye Tian's attitude.

As time passed, almost all 1,000 geniuses arrived.

At this moment, an invincible domain ancestor of the Dream Clan appeared.

He is the Invincible Domain Ancestor - Nightmare Domain Ancestor.

The Nightmare Domain Ancestor glanced at the geniuses of the various races and said, "Geniuses from the Destruction Saint Clan and the major evil clans, after you enter the Dream River, you are only allowed to enter the Dream Realm, and you are not allowed to go to other places, nor are you allowed to take away the treasures bred by the Dream River, understand? If anyone violates this rule, don't blame me for not giving face to the various clans behind you!"

"Yes, Nightmare-sama!"

One evil genius after another hurriedly said.

However, those geniuses who destroyed the Holy Clan were arrogant and didn't care about the words of the Nightmare Domain Ancestor at all.

To them, the Dream Clan was just vassals, and they weren't afraid of the Nightmare Domain Ancestor.

Of course, they didn't dare to refute it, after all, the other party was an invincible domain ancestor, and it was not something they could offend now.

"Let's go inside!"

After the Nightmare Domain Ancestor spoke, he led 1,000 geniuses into the River of Dreams.

From the outside, the River of Dreams is very small, but once you enter the River of Dreams, it is almost boundless.

Moreover, the pressure here was very huge, and even the top Domain Ancestor level felt a lot of pressure.

After flying for a long time, they finally came to the realm of dreams.

The realm of dreams was full of colors, exuding powerful fluctuations, which penetrated through the heart, making Ye Tian feel extremely comfortable, and even full of inspiration.

"What a magical place!"

Ye Tian secretly exclaimed.
